# PERF-184 positive: mime.TypeByExtension in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-184-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"mime"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	t := mime.TypeByExtension(".html")
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", t)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
